description: Lock Search Engines to a 1993 web-search scope with algorithmic indexing/query methods and without storage/scaling implementation overreach.

checks.reason: W3 Catalog provides a 1993 source-backed anchor for early web search engines.
The node is scoped to searchable catalogs and indexes of World Wide Web resources.
Search engines depend on algorithmic crawling, indexing, ranking, and query-processing methods.
Search engines require indexing and storage structures, not relational DBMS specifically.
Cloud computing is later scaling infrastructure for some deployments, not a prerequisite for early web search.
RTB/programmatic ad exchanges do not require public search indexing.
